# GREX — AI Personal Trainer

> GREX is a mobile fitness app that uses AI to create personalized daily workout plans, provide real-time coaching, and track progress. Available on iOS and Android.

## What GREX Does
- Generates personalized daily workout plans based on goals, experience, and equipment
- AI coach answers fitness questions instantly
- Tracks progress including body metrics and strength gains
- Adapts plans as you improve
- Works for beginners through advanced lifters

## Key Facts
- Website: https://grexfit.com
- Platforms: iOS and Android
- Pricing: Monthly subscription
- Founded: 2026
- Character: Alex — AI personal trainer

## Content
- Blog: https://grexfit.com/blog/posts/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@vitalhaul
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/alexfithub/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@alexfitcoach

## Blog Topics
Fitness advice, workout routines, nutrition guidance, muscle building, fat loss, beginner training, recovery, and AI fitness technology.
